option.name: originalContent
option.value: ktor: deployment: port: 8080 application: modules: - plugins.SerializationKt.configureSerialization - plugins.KoinKt.configureKoin - plugins.DatabasesKt.configureDatabase - plugins.StatusPagesKt.configureStatusPages - plugins.RoutingKt.configureRouting

option.name: updatedContent
option.value: ktor: deployment: port: 8080 application: modules: - plugins.SerializationKt.configureSerialization - plugins.KoinKt.configureKoin - plugins.DatabasesKt.configureDatabase - plugins.StatusPagesKt.configureStatusPages - plugins.CallLoggingKt.configureCallLogging - plugins.RoutingKt.configureRouting
